steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank is a possessive that modifies 'contents.' Its antecedent is 'a social media post' — a singular noun phrase. The blank must be a singular possessive pronoun, not a contraction.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘their’: Plural possessive; the antecedent 'a social media post' is singular. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘its’: Singular possessive pronoun; agrees with the singular antecedent 'a social media post.' ✓
  • Choice C — ‘they're’: Contraction meaning 'they are'; cannot function as a possessive modifier. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘it's’: Contraction meaning 'it is'; cannot function as a possessive modifier. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
